name: pi-tmux-harness
description_en: Pi extension exposing tmux as native tools — drive other TUIs (pi, claude, copilot CLI, lazygit, etc.) for adversarial testing without fragile sleep+grep loops.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将 tmux 作为原生工具暴露 — 驱动其他 TUI（pi、claude、copilot CLI、lazygit 等）进行对抗性测试，无需脆弱的 sleep+grep 循环
